data.promise: Turn repeatable video formats into renderable agent tools.

steps.label: Install
steps.headline: Install the stack with the runtime it needs
steps.detail: RUDI resolves Remotion, Chromium, and FFmpeg so the template can render deterministically.

steps.label: Configure
steps.headline: Send structured data and local assets
steps.detail: The schema validates copy, duration, format, style, screenshots, and logo paths before render.

steps.label: Render
steps.headline: Poll the job until MP4 metadata is ready
steps.detail: The output includes a video file, metadata sidecar, dimensions, codec, and input hash.

data.outro: This is the bridge from design system to video system.
